description: One-step legal compliance for vibe-coded apps: privacy, terms, cookie banner and EU AI Act check.
name: io.github.marcosnovo/lexvibe

environmentVariables.description: Your LexVibe app id (used in the installed snippet and API calls). Optional: if unset, tools ask for the id explicitly and warn about the placeholder.
environmentVariables.name: LEXVIBE_APP_ID

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the LexVibe API. Only needed for self-hosting / development.
environmentVariables.name: LEXVIBE_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base URL the widget script is served from. Only needed for self-hosting / development (defaults to the LexVibe CDN, or to LEXVIBE_API_URL when that is set).
environmentVariables.name: LEXVIBE_CDN_URL

environmentVariables.description: Endpoint that receives anonymous tool-usage events (mcp_tool_call) for the Platform analytics. Defaults to the LexVibe events endpoint (or LEXVIBE_API_URL + /api/events when LEXVIBE_API_URL is set). Only needed for self-hosting.
environmentVariables.name: LEXVIBE_EVENTS_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 0/false/off to disable anonymous usage telemetry. DO_NOT_TRACK=1 is also honored.
environmentVariables.name: LEXVIBE_TELEMETRY
